content:
Last night I learned about a group called Huntington Hackers: https://huntington-hackers.codeberg.page

"FOSS enthusiast (maybe advocacy?) group based around Huntington Ave, Boston"

They're having a meetup on Sunday at 2pm: https://gath.io/FPn18_z8bAS89oGf5dYoo

Via https://libreplanet.org/wiki/Group:Librelocal/2026
